articles.title: Prime Minister Announces New Tax Reform Bill
articles.description: The Prime Minister has proposed a sweeping tax reform bill to reduce corporate tax rate to 15%.
articles.content: In a press conference today at Downing Street, the Prime Minister announced the new corporate tax reform package. The bill aims to slash corporate taxes from 25% down to 15% starting next fiscal year. Critics claim this will benefit large companies at the expense of public services.

articles.title: Downing Street Proposes Lowering Corporate Taxes to 15 Percent
articles.description: A new bill announced by the Prime Minister proposes a 15% corporate tax rate.
articles.content: A sweeping reform package announced today proposes a lower corporate tax rate of 15%. According to officials, the reduction is intended to attract foreign investment. The opposition party has vowed to fight the bill in parliament.
